## Step 2: Similarity Queries {.nav-proposed}

Actively request *similarity queries* from the user to learn similarity embedding $\vec{e}$.

Which one is more similar to $\pi_A$, $\pi_i$ or $\pi_j$?

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: -0.5em; margin-bottom: -0.5em;">
![](images/sirl.png){width="80%"}
</div>

The use of an anchor forces the comparison to be a *local* decision.
